section_name: Failing to report convictions and judgments
text: Any person required to forward to the commissioner a record of a conviction or a judgment for damages as provided in section three hundred thirty-six, who wilfully fails or neglects to do so, shall be punished by a fine of not less than ten dollars for each separate offense.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 3
#### Article 7. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 357 — Failing to report convictions and judgments

Any person required to forward to the commissioner a record of a conviction or a judgment for damages as provided in section three hundred thirty-six, who wilfully fails or neglects to do so, shall be punished by a fine of not less than ten dollars for each separate offense.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
